projects.name: Creator Economy & Algorithmic Performance Analytics
projects.description:
Analyzed 2,467 promotional posts across 800 influencers and built an interaction-based regression model with statistically significant results to quantify how creator authority and early engagement signals drive amplification and downstream performance.
Engineered normalized efficiency KPIs including CTR, clicks per 1K reach, and saves per 1K reach to uncover a scale-efficiency tradeoff and inform creator selection and paid-boost strategy.

projects.name: Healthcare Cost & Pricing Intelligence
projects.description:
Engineered a PostgreSQL-based data pipeline across 200+ hospital datasets, standardizing them into a 24-column reporting model covering 100K+ payer-procedure combinations and improving data quality by 15%.
Developed Power BI dashboards to visualize insurer-level price variation and simplify healthcare pricing analysis for decision-support reporting.

projects.name: E-Commerce Revenue Forecasting & Demand Analytics
projects.description:
Examined 100K+ orders and $15.4M in revenue to identify seasonality trends, demand patterns, and revenue concentration insights for business planning.
Built a Power BI dashboard and forecasting model to support inventory planning, revenue analysis, and demand forecasting.
